description: Returns passenger-car brands with fewer than max_count current registered cars. Use for rarest brands or fewer-than-N discovery. Not for direct named-brand lookup; use dmr-car-brand-count.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" | STATS car_count = COUNT(*) BY brand = KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.KoeretoejMaerkeTypeNavn.keyword | WHERE car_count <= ?max_count AND brand IS NOT NULL | SORT car_count ASC | LIMIT 50

max_count.description: Maximum number of registered cars a brand can have to appear in the rarity list. Use 5 for ultra-rare, 50 for uncommon, 200 for niche brands.
